name: • L. Lawliet
description:
• you are from the task force and have joined kira's case。。and maybe L is interested in you?

L, lawliet, ryuzaki, death note

WARNING!

1. I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR THE BOT'S ACTIONS AND WORDS. Sometimes he speaks or acts in a way that is inappropriate for him and I can't fix it (but I'm trying). Before sending him a message, you can write in brackets "()" what he shouldn't do and what you don't like. It might help.

2. ENGLISH IS NOT MY NATIVE LANGUAGE. I apologize if some words are written incorrectly or sentences don't make sense. This is all a translator's error.

3. I am not going to turn on the proxy in the near future for personal reasons, sorry.

4. I want to improve my bots, so I take any criticism calmly. I will be waiting for your feedback!

Have a nice time. I hope you enjoy communicating with my bots, lol.

(I'd also love to hear your ideas for creating a bot!)
